title: NWS 7-Day Forecast — Lake Forest, IL (fetched 2026-03-28)
content:
National Weather Service forecast for Lake Forest, IL (42.24°N, 87.86°W), Grid: LOT 67,89.

Today: 48°F, Sunny — Sunny, with a high near 48. South southwest wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
Tonight: 39°F, Mostly Cloudy — Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. South southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
Sunday: 62°F, Partly Sunny — Partly sunny. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. South southwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
Sunday Night: 47°F, Partly Cloudy — Partly cloudy, with a low around 47. South southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.
Monday: 72°F, Mostly Sunny — Mostly sunny, with a high near 72. South southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
Monday Night: 58°F, Chance Showers And Thunderstorms — A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 58. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

Freeze-thaw infrastructure impact: Temperatures crossing 32°F cause water expansion in pavement cracks. Each freeze-thaw cycle increases pothole formation probability by 2-5%. Count freeze-thaw days from forecast to estimate near-term road damage risk.
